Custom Clothing Manufacturing for Australian Brands

July 1, 2026 | By FABRIOZA

Australian clothing brands face one of the highest domestic manufacturing costs in the world — Australian garment workers earn $25-35 AUD per hour, making small-batch production nearly impossible for startups. At FABRIOZA, we provide Australian brands with access to world-class manufacturing at startup-friendly prices, with MOQ from 50 pieces and shipping to Australia in 6-8 days.

Why Australian Brands Choose Pakistan

Cost Reality Check

A custom t-shirt manufactured in Australia costs $35-60 AUD. The same shirt from FABRIOZA costs $12-20 AUD landed. For a startup, this cost difference determines whether you can afford to launch or not.

Quality Match

Our ISO 9001 certification and 4-stage quality control produce garments that meet Australian consumer expectations. We manufacture for 15+ Australian brands across streetwear, gym wear, and corporate apparel.

Time Zone Advantage

Pakistan is just 4-5 hours behind Australian Eastern Time (AEST). This means significant overlap in business hours — much better than China (2-3 hours behind) or the USA (14-16 hours behind).

Shipping to Australia

MethodTimeCost (AUD)Best For
DHL Express6-8 days$12-18/kgUrgent orders, samples
Air Freight8-12 days$8-12/kgMedium orders
Sea Freight30-40 days$2-4/kgLarge orders (500+ pcs)

Australian Import Considerations

  • GST: 10% GST applies to imports over $1,000 AUD — we provide full documentation
  • Biosecurity: All garments must be clean and free from contaminants — we guarantee compliance
  • Labeling: ACCC-compliant care labels with fiber content and country of origin
  • Sizing: Australian size standards (8-22 women, S-3XL men)

Popular Products for Australian Brands

  • Surf/Swim Cover-ups: Lightweight cotton and mesh styles
  • Gym Wear: Performance fabrics for the fitness-obsessed Australian market
  • Streetwear: Heavyweight hoodies and tees for Melbourne/Sydney fashion
  • Workwear: Durable cotton drill shirts and pants
  • Corporate Polos: Pique cotton with embroidered logos
